FIGHT STRATEGY - Jaw Worm

FIGHT TYPE: Hallway - full block every turn.

INCOMING: 11 (Chomp, always first move)
Hand: Defend, Strike, Zap, Strike, Defend
Energy: 4

PATHS TO ZERO:
A) 2x Defend (10 block, 2E) + Zap (0E) + 2x Strike (12 damage, 2E) = 4E total. 10 block vs 11 incoming = 1 damage taken. NOT zero.
B) 2x Defend (10 block) + Zap (0E) + 1x Strike (6 damage, 1E) = 3E, 1E wasted. Still 1 damage taken.

PLAY ORDER: Zap first (free, channels Lightning), then 2x Strike (12 damage), then 2x Defend (10 block). Energy: 0+1+1+1+1=4.
